description: convert a DICOM file's pixel data to a standard image format (PNG/JPEG/TIFF/BMP), normalising grayscale to 8-bit and optionally applying VOI LUT windowing
rules: output image written to record_store (filename from IMG_OUT, default image.png)
grayscale pixel data is normalised to uint8 (0-255)
APPLY_WINDOWING=1 applies VOI LUT windowing when WindowCenter is present
FRAME selects a frame for multi-frame DICOM (default 0)
degrades gracefully when pydicom/numpy/Pillow are not importable
usage: Set DICOM_IN (input .dcm). Optional IMG_OUT (filename, default image.png), IMG_FORMAT (PNG|JPEG|TIFF|BMP, default inferred from extension), APPLY_WINDOWING (1 to enable), FRAME (int, default 0). Output: the image under record_store.
limitation: Read-only: converts a single frame to a still image. Requires pydicom, numpy and Pillow; compressed transfer syntaxes may need extra decoders (pylibjpeg/gdcm). Degrades to a placeholder if a dependency is absent.
